tools.name: shorten_link
tools.description: Shorten a URL into an in.bio short link. Free, no account or token needed. Anonymous links are deleted after 30 days unless claimed via the returned claim_url; claimed/account links also get click analytics.

tools.name: generate_qr_code
tools.description: Generate a styled QR code image URL. Free, no token needed. Encodes a URL, text, Wi-Fi credentials, vCard, email, phone, SMS, or WhatsApp payload. Returns a stable image URL (PNG or SVG) that can be embedded or downloaded directly.

tools.name: create_link
tools.description: Create a short link on the authenticated INBIO account, with full options (custom slug, title, tags, folder, UTM parameters, expiration, password, click limit). Requires the links:write token scope.

tools.name: list_links
tools.description: List the account's short links with optional filters. Requires links:read scope.

tools.name: get_link
tools.description: Fetch one short link by id. Requires links:read scope.

tools.name: update_link
tools.description: Update a short link (any subset of create_link fields, plus slug). Editing destination_url requires the Pro+ edit-destination feature. Requires links:write scope.

tools.name: delete_link
tools.description: Delete a short link (it stops redirecting). Requires links:write scope.

tools.name: set_link_enabled
tools.description: Enable or disable a short link. Requires links:write scope.

tools.name: get_link_analytics
tools.description: Click analytics for a link: totals, daily series, top countries, devices, browsers, referrers. Bot traffic is excluded. Requires analytics:read scope.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List the account's link folders. Requires links:read scope.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List the account's link tags. Requires links:read scope.

tools.name: get_account_usage
tools.description: Current plan, period usage (links created, clicks, API requests), and plan limits for the authenticated account.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "generate_qr_code" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate a styled QR code image URL. Free, no token needed. Encodes a URL, text, Wi-Fi credentials, vCard, email, phone, SMS, or WhatsApp payload. Returns a sta…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "create_link" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create a short link on the authenticated INBIO account, with full options (custom slug, title, tags, folder, UTM parameters, expiration, password, click limit).…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: shorten_link · Private data: shorten_link, generate_qr_code, create_link · Public sink: generate_qr_code · Destructive: delete_link.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: shorten_link · Private data: shorten_link, generate_qr_code, create_link · Public sink: generate_qr_code · Destructive: delete_link

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
